parameters.query: SELECT last_update_id FROM telegram_bot_state WHERE bot_id = 'homeai';

SET app.current_entity = 'all'; WITH a AS (SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE result='success') AS success, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE result='failure') AS failure, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE provider='local') AS local_calls, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE provider='anthropic') AS cloud_calls FROM audit_log WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'), e AS (SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status='processed') AS processed, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status='failed') AS failed, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status IN ('pending','processing')) AS in_flight FROM events WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'), al AS (SELECT COUNT(*) AS firing FROM system_alerts WHERE status='firing' AND acknowledged=FALSE), dl AS (SELECT COUNT(*) AS open FROM dead_letter WHERE resolved=FALSE), inv AS (SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status='needs_review' OR requires_human=TRUE) AS needs_review FROM invoices WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'), em AS (SELECT COUNT(*) AS classified_24h FROM emails WHERE received_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours') SELECT a.success, a.failure, a.local_calls, a.cloud_calls, e.processed, e.failed, e.in_flight, al.firing, dl.open, inv.needs_review, em.classified_24h FROM a, e, al, dl, inv, em;
UPDATE telegram_bot_state SET last_update_id = GREATEST(last_update_id, {{ $json.max_update_id }}), updated_at = NOW() WHERE bot_id = 'homeai';
